title: The Art of Screenshake
creator: Jan Willem Nijman
description: A compact demonstration of animation, recoil, particles, sound, pauses, and camera movement applied to a simple action-game prototype.
useful: A practical before-and-after vocabulary for making player actions feel more legible and forceful.
audience: Beginning designers and programmers polishing action prototypes.
learning: Make actions easier to read with immediate feedback
Combine recoil, particles, pauses, and camera motion
Judge polish through clear before-and-after comparisons
